name: Location-Driven Production Strategy
consequences: Immediate: Prioritizes Hong Kong's vertical architecture for immersive paranoia → Systemic: 25% cost savings from local crews but 40% increased risk of permit delays due to dense urban logistics → Strategic: Enhances cultural authenticity but forces narrative concessions to physical constraints. Controls budget efficiency vs. creative freedom. Weakness: The options fail to consider local labor union negotiation dynamics.

review: Controls budget efficiency vs. creative freedom. Weakness: The options fail to consider local labor union negotiation dynamics.
